visual_description:
A medium close-up shot focuses on a woman with long, straight blonde hair. She is wearing a black, short-sleeved blouse with a floral and abstract pattern in shades of brown and beige. She gestures with her hands as she speaks, looking slightly off-camera. The background consists of a wooden cabinet with ornate carvings, on top of which sits an old-fashioned television and several decorative figurines. The camera remains static. A woman speaks with a concerned and slightly anxious tone, asking, "You think he's still following her?"

The camera cuts to a wide shot of four people in a living room. On a light-colored couch, a man on the left has his arm in a large black and white sling and is looking down at a paper in his lap. In the center, a man in a dark blue t-shirt looks forward with a concerned expression. To his right, a woman with dark hair, wearing a white top, sits with a somber look. Standing behind the couch, another man in a grey long-sleeved shirt looks down at the group with a serious expression. The background is a cluttered but cozy apartment living room, with a kitchen visible behind the couch. The camera is stationary. A man responds with a low, serious
